Append a calc_context to a multi-aim study

Source: R/power_test_registry.R
add_aim.Rd

Append a calc_context to a multi-aim study

Usage

add_aim(study, ctx, name = NULL, outcome = NULL)

Arguments

study

A `multi_aim_study` from `multi_aim_study()`.

ctx

A `calc_context` from `power_calc()`.

name

Aim label (e.g. "Aim 1", "Primary"). Defaults to "Aim N" where N is the next ordinal.

outcome

Outcome description (e.g. "Toxicity at 3 months"). Defaults to the test description.

Value

The study with the new aim appended.
